name: archive_knowledge
scope: Archive / Knowledge current-system contracts for tracked entities and entity milestones.
principles: Historical import contracts remain in tech_insight_loop_legacy_import.json.
Current report-item entity milestones write only tracked_entities/entity_milestones.
Creating an entity milestone never mutates raw_items, news_items, generated_news, daily reports, weekly reports, recommendations, or company SQL exports.
Every current milestone created from a report item must preserve report item, generated news, news item, raw item, and data source trace when available.

published_report_candidate_milestones.idempotency: one candidate per (tracked_entity, news_item); manual report-item registrations for the same pair suppress auto candidates

entity_milestones.idempotency: Posting the same report item and tracked entity updates the same milestone.

update_entity_milestone.rule: Only legacy_system=current milestones are editable; imported legacy milestones are immutable. Candidate confirm/reject reuses this API with curation_status confirmed/revoked.

create_tracked_entity.rule: Case-insensitive unique name per workspace; duplicates return 409.

update_tracked_entity.rule: Only legacy_system=current entities are editable; imported legacy entities are immutable.

delete_tracked_entity.rule: Only legacy_system=current entities without milestones can be deleted.

get_tracked_entity_timeline.rule: Milestones grouped by event month (desc); undated events group under 未标注时间 at the end.

create_entity_milestone_manual.rule: Manual backfill for a tracked entity; created as confirmed and selected for timeline; optional news_item_id keeps raw/news trace.

list_report_archive.rule: Merged read-only view of published daily/weekly reports and imported historical reports with month/keyword/type/origin filters and per-report stats (item_count, adopted_count, headline_count, adoption_rate, top_sources). Above app.archive.report_archive.SQL_AGGREGATION_THRESHOLD total reports the endpoint switches to the SQL aggregation fallback (lightweight index for filter/sort/pagination; full item-chain hydration only for the requested page); the response shape is unchanged.

request_query.report_type: optional daily|weekly: restricts totals and month buckets; legacy reports count under their normalized type (unknown -> daily)
request_query.origin: optional published|legacy: origin=legacy zeroes item/adoption stats and top_sources instead of emitting placeholder averages

get_report_archive_summary.rule: Aggregates archive totals, month buckets, average adoption rate, and top_sources of adopted published items (legacy imports carry no source data); never mutates reports. report_type/origin filters give per-type/per-origin month buckets for timeline anchors and the legacy view month nav; the SQL aggregation fallback applies above the same threshold with identical output.

get_entity_timeline_summary.rule: Workspace-level read-only overview: entity/milestone totals, selected milestone count, distributions by entity_type/event_type/importance_level, earliest/latest event time, and unresolved legacy reference counts.

publish_extraction.match_rule: case-insensitive containment of tracked entity name or aliases_json terms in item title/summary
publish_extraction.writes: tracked entity milestones only; never raw/news/report/recommendation/company SQL

optional.tracked_entity_id: existing tracked entity in same workspace
optional.event_title: string; defaults to report item display title
optional.event_time: datetime; defaults to news/raw/report item time
optional.event_brief: string; defaults to report item summary
optional.impact_brief: string; defaults to report item summary
optional.board: string; defaults to generated insight board or category

optional.aliases: list of strings; used by publish-time candidate extraction

rules: The write entry must require a user-entered entity name.
The timeline page remains the place to inspect entity events and legacy reference resolution.
The write entry must not imply import execution, recommendation, adoption, or SQL export.
Only current milestones show edit, confirm, revoke, and convert-to-requirement actions.

requirement_links.historical_feedback_rule: Historical feedback can become an internal requirement source for source-quality复盘; it remains archive evidence and must not create current comments, ratings, recommendations, report adoption, or company SQL export rows.
